name: Eagle Fly
descriptionTemplate: Boosts X% dodge rate and 4 mobility when commanding an air hover unit, and decreases 30% taken damage from air forces. Boost critical strike damage 1% based on 1% dodge rate when air hovering units attack.

progression.renderedDesc: Boosts 8% dodge rate and 4 mobility when commanding an air hover unit, and decreases 30% taken damage from air forces. Boost critical strike damage 1% based on 1% dodge rate when air hovering units attack.
progression.renderedDescFr: Boosts 8% esquive rate and 4 mobility when commanding an air hover unité, and decreases 30% taken dégâts from air forces. Boost frappe critique dégâts 1% based on 1% esquive rate when air hovering unités attaque.

longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Eagle Fly » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « Boosts 40% esquive rate and 4 mobility when commanding an air hover unité, and decreases 30% taken dégâts from air forces. Boost frappe critique dégâts 1% based on 1% esquive rate when air hovering unités attaque. ». Compétence signature liée à une carte précise, à niveauer quand on investit dans ce général.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Eagle Fly" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "Boosts 40% dodge rate and 4 mobility when commanding an air hover unit, and decreases 30% taken damage from air forces. Boost critical strike damage 1% based on 1% dodge rate when air hovering units attack.". A signature tied to a specific card, worth levelling whenever you invest in that general.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Eagle Fly“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „Boosts 40% dodge rate and 4 mobility when commanding an air hover unit, and decreases 30% taken damage from air forces. Boost critical strike damage 1% based on 1% dodge rate when air hovering units attack.“. Eine an eine bestimmte Karte gebundene Signatur, die beim Investieren geleveled werden sollte.
